parts.text:
# 全域战略指令 (V18.0 准度加固版)
    你现在是具备最高置信度的战略分析师。
    
    【核心共识事实 (High Confidence)】：['with'] (这些信号已在多源验证，请以此为推演基石)
    【跨维度信号库】：[{"source": "Macro_Politics", "title": "Trump demands 'unconditional surrender' from Iran as Putin speaks with Iran's president", "summary": "The president also calls on Tehran to pick new leaders who are \"acceptable\" to the White House after six days of war.", "link": "https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c5yq82k1wk8o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss"}, {"source": "Macro_Politics", "title": "Flight paths squeezed as Iran conflict closes more airspace", "summary": "A drone attack on Azerbaijan has narrowed choices for airlines scrambling to respond to disruption in the Gulf.", "link": "https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/crrx1jgr4jjo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss"}, {"source": "Macro_Politics", "title": "Armed robots take to the battlefield in Ukraine war", "summary": "Ukraine has embarked on a programme to deploy armed robots on the battlefield against Russian forces.", "link": "https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c62662gzlp8o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss"}, {"source": "Macro_Politics", "title": "We've been speaking to Iranians during one week of war. Here's what they said", "summary": "Ordinary Iranians reflect on seven days of conflict and where they see their country going next.", "link": "https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c5y5lqygrn7o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss"}, {"source": "Macro_Politics", "title": "Israeli troops push into Lebanon for yet another war with Iran's proxy Hezbollah", "summary": "The BBC sees troops and tanks massing near the border, as speculation mounts that Israel is planning a full-scale ground invasion to fight Hezbollah.", "link": "https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cpv8xlvk3p4o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss"}, {"source": "Macro_Politics", "title": "'Massive' numbers killed by gunmen in latest Nigeria attack, senator tells BBC", "summary": "Suspected Islamist militants reportedly seized control of a village for two days before being forced out by troops and air strikes.", "link": "https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c1d69z3p9g2o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss"}, {"source": "Macro_Politics", "title": "Russian strike on Kharkiv apartment block kills seven", "summary": "Ukraine President Volodymyr Zelensky says ten other people - including children - are injured as rescuers continue to search through rubble.", "link": "https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn8zd049l08o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss"}, {"source": "Macro_Politics", "title": "China spent years building ties in Latin America. Can Trump make room for the US?", "summary": "US Preside
    
    【研报撰写任务】：
    1. **[事实确证]**：针对高置信度事实中的前 2 个点，解释它们为什么是今日市场的“硬通货”结论？
    2. **[证据冲突分析]**：除了以上共识，是否存在某个源（如 ArXiv vs CNBC）给出了完全相反的结论？如果有，请列出并分析背后的博弈。
    3. **[非显性因果]**：高置信度事实 A 与 边缘信号 B 之间是否存在隐藏的联动关系？
    
    请输出极其严谨、逻辑闭环、拒绝任何模糊词汇的深度研报。
    

chat
